name: Pumpkin Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the egg, pumpkin, flour, milk, and melted butter.
2. Stir in the salt, pepper, and baking powder.
3. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot deep fat.
4. Fry fritters until they are golden brown; drain on paper towels.
5. Serve with ham or crisp bacon.
